calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Continued To Jun-13-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: Caritas Management.
Plaintiff's witness: Joseph Stinson, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jeremy Brown.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Sixty-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 3048 16th Street, San Francisco.
Damages of $336.00
Costs $276.30, for a total of $612.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
